note: Slurs and strongly offensive words removed from the game. Every word here is present in the validation boundary and is denied everywhere: never valid to play, never displayed, and a rack whose only eight-letter words are all denied is excluded from the calendar. The generation script copies this list into public/data/patch-deny.txt. Ambiguous words with innocent primary meanings (nip, hebe, fairies, dyke, cretin, imbecile, gypsy) are deliberately NOT denied, because rejecting a legitimate play is a real cost in a word game. Expand this list as needed; expanding it only ever removes plays, so it is always safe to grow.
